name: course-review
description: Evidence-aware, time-constrained course review application generator with canonical learning memory and privacy-aware external-AI practice generation.
author: SOLO AI Assistant

targetAudience.direct: AI agents that generate or adapt interactive review applications
targetAudience.ultimate: Learners with weak foundations, incomplete materials, exam anxiety, or limited preparation time

productPromise: Generate the smallest useful, explainable learning path from available evidence and observed learning history without predicting scores or implying teacher review.
coreModules: wrongbook backed by permanent attempt history
nonGoals: claims that inferred topics are high-frequency or must-test
treating unverified AI questions as diagnostic ground truth
